name: character-sheet
description: Persistent character sheet management for player characters and important NPCs. Tracks ability scores, HP, AC, speed, class features, spell slots, inventory, gold, experience, and level progression. Provides quick lookups during play so the DM always has the numbers at hand.
author: Cocapn

commands.name: char:create
commands.description: Create a new character sheet with full stats
commands.example: char:create Thorin Dwarf Fighter 5 STR:18 DEX:12 CON:16 INT:8 WIS:10 CHA:14

commands.name: char:show
commands.description: Display a character's current sheet with all stats and resources

commands.name: char:update
commands.description: Update a specific field on a character sheet

commands.name: char:spellslots
commands.description: View or modify a character's spell slot usage

commands.name: char:inventory
commands.description: Add, remove, or list items in a character's inventory
commands.example: char:inventory Thorin add Potion of Healing

commands.name: char:levelup
commands.description: Level up a character with new HP, features, and spell slots

commands.name: char:list
commands.description: List all tracked characters with basic info

commands.name: char:rest
commands.description: Apply a short or long rest to restore resources
